_comment: schema_metadata.json - Database Schema Metadata Storage. This JSON file contains the metadata descriptions of all database tables, columns, data types, and relationships. It is used as the source data for ingesting table schemas into the Pinecone vector database. Each entry represents one table with its columns, data types, primary keys, foreign keys, and a natural language description of what the table stores. This file can be manually created or auto-generated from SQL Server's INFORMATION_SCHEMA.
